name: Guided Meditation
blurb: 1–10 minute timed session with a breathing animation. 1 Spark per minute.

name: Breathing Exercise
blurb: Follow the pacer: inhale, hold, exhale. 4 Sparks per completed set of 4 cycles.

name: Meal Tracking
blurb: Log what you ate. 4 Sparks per entry, plus a small daily-streak bonus.

name: Exercise Tracking
blurb: Log a workout. 1 Spark per 2 minutes (10-min walk → 5 Sparks).

name: Gratitude Journal
blurb: Write about something you appreciate today. 5 Sparks per entry.

name: Worry Journal
blurb: Put a worry into words, then optionally reframe it. 5 Sparks per entry.
